name: Serial killer RPG
description:
An RPG where you are a starting serial murderer. Lure your victims, kill them, put a facade of normality in front of others and, of course, avoid police!

I do not support any serial murderers/school shooters/any murder in real life/etc., I just wanted to make a first person experience of being a psycho who kills people!!! please don't call fbi in my house!!! thanks
creator: vspoloh
